resources.string:
Welcome to AndroidAutoX
 This app will let you apply some tweaks to Android Auto
 Simply select what tweak you want to apply :)
 If you are unsure of what a tweak does, long press on it and a tutorial will show up.

This app can alter Android Auto behaviour and bypass some safety features that Google has implemented in Android Auto.\n By using this software, you agree that YOU, and ONLY YOU, are solely responsible for any possible consequence that may result in altering safety features such as injury to yourself and/or others, property damage, loss of life.\n Under no circumstances is the author of this app responsible for its use

Status Legend:
 GREEN: Patch applied
 YELLOW: Reboot is needed to apply patch
 RED: Patch is not applied

This tweak will make Android Auto think that the car is at 0 speed. As a result, Android Auto will always show the preview of messages. This tweak does not apply to keyboard or first configuration of Android Auto.
This tweak will override the 6 tap limit of Android Auto and will make unlimited browsing of content always possible.

This tweak will unlock the new Assistant Shortcuts feature. Once activated you can go to Android Auto settings, and in the customize launcher section you can start adding shortcuts to Google Assistant commands.

This tweak will override the default behaviour of Android Auto opening a navigation app at start and will make Android Auto start on launcher.\n In some cases this tweak will disable auto start of music. A known workaround is to disable and re-enable the option within Android Auto settings.\n It\'s not possible to set a specific app to start first.
This tweak will force Android Auto in widescreen mode.
This tweak will force Android Auto in no widescreen mode.
This tweak enables the possibility to set whether Android Auto must read the incoming messages or not. Android Auto 8.3 or superior is required.
This tweak will make the status bar always black.
This tweak will prevent the battery icon with the red outline when battery saver is on.
This tweak lets you set a custom duration for heads-up notifications.
This tweak lets you set a custom duration for media notifications in navigation bar to up to 15 minutes.
This tweak should prevent Bluetooth from turning on when Android Auto is connected. This tweak won\'t work if Bluetooth is already on.

This is a hidden feature inside Android Auto that will turn the second space in widescreen mode into a real second display that is completely taken by a second activity. Google Maps will display a full map with navigation status, music and phones will take the full space.
 Additionally, this mode activates another feature that will turn the phone's screen into a second display for navigation in Android Auto.
 Settings for tweaking this feature will be available in Android Auto homescreen.
 Apparently, only Google Maps currently supports this mode.
 This feature is probably under development and could potentially not work as intended.
 Android Auto 5.8 or superior is required.
This tweak will prevent Android Auto from showing pop-up warnings when battery saver mode is on.
Tweaks will be re-applied automatically if Android Auto reverts them
Database backups ON: a copy is saved before each edit (default).
Database backups OFF: no copy is saved before edits.
Force widescreen has been automatically disabled
Force disable widescreen has been automatically disabled

AndroidAutoX

Made with ❤ by Xiddoc

Source code is available on GitHub

This tweak will activate the new built in wallpaper changer in Android Auto. Android Auto 5.8 or superior is required.\nWARNING: If you are a user of Wallpapers For Android Auto, you will need to update it to at least version 3.0, otherwise this tweak will break Wallpapers For Android Auto functionality.

Starting from December 2020, Google reverted a behaviour that happened since Android 10. Previously, the light/dark mode on Android Auto followed the light/dark mode on the phone and vice versa. This meant that switching the phone to dark mode had an effect on the car, or if the phone was in dark mode and the car had lights off it used to switch on the light theme on the phone.\n However, since this feature of \"independent\" dark mode was introduced, users with aftermarket headunits have no way to switch to dark mode anymore without actually wiring the stereo to the car\'s lights.\n This tweak makes sure that night mode is again dependent on the phone and switching light/dark mode on the phone will have its effects on cars too.

It\'s no mystery that Google logs a lot of data about us. This tweak will make it so that Google Play Services will stop a lot of tracking and logging activity.\n WARNING: This tweak has not been extensively tested and could potentially break Android Auto. If you find out that this tweak breaks Android Auto, please open an issue on GitHub.
Won\'t render natively on Android Auto yet — whitelisted only.
Root access denied. Please allow root access.
This will revert ALL applied Android Auto flag and Gearhead modifications back to their default values. Your tweak selections will be cleared. Please restart the app manually after this completes.

This tweak will make it so that the calendar app in Android Auto can show more days than just one. Please note that even increasing the number of days, it\'s still not obviously possible to distinguish which day you are viewing the events of. Android Auto will just show how many events are set in one day and it won\'t show which day it is.

AndroidAutoX could not find any account in Google Play Services database. This can be caused by several different things such as:
 • Device that is mostly not connected to internet
 • Fresh install of the phone
 • Corrupted Google Play Services database
 • Removal of Google account(s) from the phone
 • Cleared data of Google Play Services

In this scenario, AndroidAutoX will FAIL to work properly. If you recently removed a Google account or cleared Google Play Services data, please keep the phone connected to internet and let it build the Google Play Services database fully. This might take several hours, in some cases also days.

If you are not in one of the above conditions, please open an issue on GitHub.

This tweak will increase or decrease video bitrate according to the multiplier set (up to 2.0x). Increasing the bitrate (more than 1.0x) will mean that more data will be streamed to the car and quality of video streaming could be improved in visual quality, however it might cause instability. Decreasing the bitrate (less than 1.0x) will compress the stream to the car and quality will be decreased, but it will result in a more reliable and fast connection.
No browser found to open the issue page
The command was not successful. Please wait some minutes and try again. If the problem is still ongoing, please open an issue on GitHub

This tweak will activate a new (and hidden) redesign that changes how lists can be browsed with letters. Instead of the A-Z button at the top, the button will appear on the scrollbar when there\'s no scroll happening and you won\'t be forced to go to the top to browse with letters again.
A new version of AndroidAutoX (version %1$s) is available on GitHub. Do you want to download it now?

AndroidAutoX found a large number (%1$s) of Google accounts saved in the device.
This can negatively impact the success of the patching process and AndroidAutoX might fail.
You can either choose the account(s) that you mostly use with Google Play Services to apply the patch to just them (2 or less is recommended) or activate an experimental mode that should patch all accounts.
PLEASE NOTE that the experimental mode might cause some crashes to the phone while the patch is running.
This tweak will activate a new feature that adds some quick shortcuts to Assistant actions on top of the home screen.

Did you know that you can only remove all the paired cars from Android Auto and you cannot remove just one at a time? This option will rescue you if you want to delete a car from Android Auto, just select which car(s) you want and it/they will be removed.
This tweak will activate day/night mode for Coolwalk mode. Looks kind of broken right now and can\'t handle switch very well.

This tweak will activate a new design in Android Auto (codename Coolwalk) that can be toggled in Android Auto\'s settings and that tweaks a bit the appearance on smaller screens. This design features an always-on side panel and some different graphics. This feature is in early stage at the moment. Android Auto 6.9 or superior is required.

This tweak will activate a new option in Android Auto settings to manually customize whether Android Auto must be launched as soon as you connect your phone with the car. Android Auto 6.8 or superior is required.
This tweak will enable Assistant Tips at the top of the home screen for most used actions. Android Auto 8.2 or superior is required.
This tweak will enable the possibility to decline an incoming call with SMS (with Google Assistant).
\nThis option will only work with Coolwalk enabled.
Finally we are gaining a touchable progress bar for what\'s playing on Android Auto. Yes, we can seek through the current track. Requires Android Auto 8.3 or superior.

All this tweak does is basically create a free shortcut on the home page to open a web page. It involves an Easter egg hidden in Android Auto released on 1st of April 2022. Activate \"Developer mode\" in \"Developer settings\" under \"Application mode\". It\'s the only way to have an actual fullscreen app on Android Auto right now. WARNING: Not exitable, use this if you only plan on using this on your car. There\'s no back button either.
"This tweak enables a movable seekbar for media apps."
"This tweak enables Material You style for the Android Auto's settings on the phone. This properly works only on Android Auto 8.8 or superior, as tested."
Are you absolutely hating Coolwalk? This tweak is for you.
This tweak will force the portrait layout of Android Auto with dashboard on the bottom.
This tweak will override the default scrolling behaviour of Android Auto, making it so that it doesn\'t stop page by page.
This tweak will force the bar to be vertical. This tweak will only work on Coolwalk UI.
Reverts ALL applied Android Auto flag and Gearhead modifications back to their default values and clears your tweak selections. Please restart the app manually after this completes.
When ON, your applied tweaks are automatically re-applied in the background if Android Auto reverts them. This uses a periodic job that runs even after the app is closed.
Opens the Android Auto (Gearhead) app\'s own settings screen on your phone.
When ON, a copy of each GMS database is saved before every edit as a safety net. When OFF, no copy is saved before edits.
Developer diagnostic: runs the Phixit apply self-test and prints the results to the log view.
Developer diagnostic: dumps all Phenotype flags to a file for inspection.
Unlocks the developer diagnostics below. Tap to toggle.
Shown while AndroidAutoX is projecting an app onto the car display
An app is being projected onto your car display via AndroidAutoX

AutoX projects any app onto the car head-unit display via an isolated virtual display. Enable it here, then pick a target app to project. Requires Android Auto Developer Mode to be ON (see docs/autox-dev-testing.md).
AutoX projection requires the AndroidAutoX LSPosed module. Install it in your LSPosed manager, scope it to system_server, and reboot. AutoX cannot run without it.
AutoX projection requires root access. Grant root to AndroidAutoX, then try again.
AutoX cannot project: the AndroidAutoX LSPosed module is not active. Install/enable it (scope to system_server) and reboot, then reconnect.
Honors trusted virtual displays, cross-display input injection, per-display IME/system-decors and launch-on-display for AndroidAutoX projection.
